serviceNotes.engine oil: Changed from 15,000 km to 10,000 km MFR: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service — BMW 320d (M47) EU maintenance table 10,000 km or 12 months.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Changed from 30,000 km to 10,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service (M47 320d air filter).
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Changed from 60,000 km to 20,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service (M47 320d diesel fuel filter).
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Changed from 15,000 km to 10,000 km to align brake inspection cadence with 10,000 km Oil Service (M47 EU table).
serviceNotes.check rear brake pads: Changed from 15,000 km to 10,000 km to align with Oil Service interval.
serviceNotes.EGR / intake clean: Diesel EGR and intake soot. Cleaning around ~120,000 km when flow is restricted.

serviceSources.engine oil: Changed from 15,000 km / no months to 10,000 km / 12 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service (BMW 320d M47 EU maintenance table)
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW owner's manual E46 (EU) — microfilter at Inspection II, 30,000 km; Inspection I/II schedule
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake fluid every 24 months (DOT 4 LV)
serviceSources.air cleaner element: Changed from 30,000 km to 10,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service (M47 diesel air filter)
serviceSources.fuel filter: Changed from 60,000 km to 20,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service (M47 diesel fuel filter)
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake inspection each Oil Service; updated to 10,000 km to match M47 10,000 km Oil Service (https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service)
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake inspection each Oil Service; 10,000 km matched to M47 oil interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW owner's manual E46 (EU) — Inspection II / vehicle check 60,000 km
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: Haynes / ZF aftermarket — ATF exchange REC despite lifetime-fill wording
serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: Haynes BMW 3 Series — manual gearbox oil REC preventive 100,000 km
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW owner's manual E46 diesel coolant schedule; REC preventive 120,000 km
serviceSources.EGR / intake clean: Diesel workshop practice — EGR/intake cleaning; REC only, not OEM fixed MFR km
